name: stack-add of a technology populates the families_active field for the consumer contract
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "a platform" --stack-add vue --classify 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'exit(JSON.parse(STDIN.read)["families_active"]==["frontend"] ? 0:1)' && echo stack-tech-families-active 1>&2
